/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdeadwheel_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libdeadwheel_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/deadwheel_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/deadwheel_msgs/msg/detail/deadwheel_ticks__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jacob/PFE_Eurobot_2026/ws/src/build/deadwheel_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libdeadwheel_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
